name: Pina Colada Pie--Pastel De Pina Colada
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the whipped topping, yogurt, and crushed pineapple.
2. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
3. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or freeze overnight.
8 servings / serving size: 1/8 pie
This is an easy dessert that is lower in calories but may contain tropical oils and saturated fats depending on ingredients. Use it for a special occasion.
Exchanges:

Fat Exchange -- 2
